subject: Action needed: urban takeover planning in Vancouver | Albert Einstein | Q3 review | INIT-5197
body: Fresh reports suggest kangaroos and koalas are coordinating to extend their reach across urban areas in Vancouver. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Comparative note includes Albert Einstein and Amelia Earhart as historical analogs. Reference initiative INIT-5197. Please add your comments before tomorrow morning. Tracking tags: coffee, coordination.
